sentences.arabic: زَارَ الطُّلَّابُ مَكْتَبَةَ المَدْرَسَةِ مَعَ المُعَلِّمِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su posjetili školsku biblioteku s nastavnikom.
sentences.translationEn: The students visited the school library with the teacher.

sentences.translation: Biblioteka je bila tiha i puna knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: The library was quiet and full of books.

sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je odabrao knjigu koju voli.
sentences.translationEn: Each student chose a book they liked.

sentences.translation: Sjeli su na stolice i tiho čitali.
sentences.translationEn: They sat on chairs and read quietly.
